sources.outlet: Volcanica (2025) — Fee, Tan et al., AVO/UAF + USGS
sources.note: VOISS-Net: a spectrogram CNN to detect and classify volcano seismicity; the generalized model reaches 87% accuracy on the test set.

Independent confirmation: 87% test accuracy, trained on 270,000+ spectrograms across 7 volcanoes (Pavlof, Semisopochnoi, Tanaga, Takawangha, Redoubt, Etna, Kilauea); classes = tremor, explosions, earthquakes, long-period events, noise.

sources.outlet: USGS / Alaska Volcano Observatory — Volcano Updates
sources.note: Great Sitkin at WATCH / ORANGE, slow lava effusion continuing in the summit crater, per the AVO update dated July 8, 2026 (the live in-window hook).
AVO monitoring page for Great Sitkin Volcano (Aleutians); seismic + infrasound networks, webcams, satellite.
